overall.description: A first-person walk through a cyberpunk urban environment approaching and entering a large building with a distinctive curved glass facade and prominent teal neon signage. The scene transitions from bright sunlit exteriors past abandoned vehicles to a darker interior atrium with a grand staircase.

scene_state.functional_zone: abandoned urban street with derelict vehicles

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the street approaching the large curved glass building complex

entered.detail: large multi-story structure with distinctive curved glass and metal roof framework
derelict white delivery van with rust and damage parked on the street
tall palm trees lining the right side of the street
industrial construction crane visible above the building
orange metal scaffolding structure against the building facade

segments.scene_description: Walking along an abandoned city street toward a massive curved glass building. Derelict vehicles including a white van are scattered on the asphalt, while palm trees and construction cranes frame the scene under bright midday sun.

scene_state.functional_zone: building entrance approach with prominent neon signage

events.description: camera tilts upward toward the sun creating lens flare against the glass facade
approaching the building entrance threshold, preparing to enter interior

agents.ego_description: walking toward the entrance while looking up at the AKEBONO signage and curved glass architecture

entered.detail: large teal neon sign spelling 'AKEBONO' mounted on the building entrance
transparent curved glass and steel entrance canopy
bright sun glare appearing as camera angles upward

segments.scene_description: Approaching the building entrance where a prominent teal 'AKEBONO' neon sign dominates the view. The camera tilts upward to capture the sign against the bright sun and curved glass canopy, while the surrounding palm trees shift from right to left as the entrance draws near.

events.description: crossing from bright exterior into the dimly lit interior atrium
interior lighting reveals details of the grand staircase and distant figures

agents.ego_description: walking into the dark interior atrium and approaching the central grand staircase

notable_agents.action: standing near the base of the grand staircase

entered.detail: wide central staircase leading upward into the building interior
dark counter or desk structure in the lobby area
curved glass ceiling panels visible from inside the atrium
industrial chain hanging from the ceiling structure

segments.scene_description: Entering the dark interior atrium from the bright exterior, revealing a grand central staircase and industrial interior details. The curved glass structure is now viewed from inside as an atrium ceiling, while distant NPC figures stand near the stairs in the dimly lit space.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person movement from a sun-drenched, derelict city street into the shadowed depths of a futuristic corporate atrium. It begins by advancing along an asphalt road littered with abandoned vehicles and a white van, framed by palm trees and distant construction cranes under a bright midday sun. As the camera approaches the massive curved glass building, the view tilts upward to reveal a prominent teal AKEBONO neon sign glowing against the canopy. The scene then shifts abruptly from the blinding exterior light into a dim interior, where the glass structure transforms into a soaring atrium ceiling. Finally, the perspective opens up to reveal a grand central staircase and industrial architectural details, with distant figures standing silently in the low light.
